issue: LibreOffice emits empty oddHeader and oddFooter elements during XLSX round trips. The structural counter treated element presence as header/footer content, creating false pairwise material differences against Google Sheets exports that omit the empty elements.
correction: Count only non-empty trimmed header/footer text in odd, even, and first header/footer elements.
decisionRule: Rerun the same six fixtures and the complete frozen population. Do not count the pre-correction results toward any gate.
